input.background: A parallel system consists of 3 independent components, each having 0.95 reliability. The system reliability is calculated using the formula $$R=1-(1-0.95)^3=0.9999$$.
input.question: What is the failure time density of the system?

output.answer: The system failure time density is $$f(t)=\frac{d F}{d t}=\sum_{i=1}^{n} f_i(t) \prod_{\substack{j=1 \\ j \neq i}}^{n} F_j(t)$$.
